vehicle.label: Long-Range Surveillance Wing
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing flying-wing UAV, 2m wingspan, 4+ hour endurance

parts.label: Center Body Pod
parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

parts.label: Elevon Servo Pocket x 2
parts.spec: Elevon servo pocket, MG90S or DS215MG, control horn linkage, removable access cover

parts.label: Motor + Pusher Prop Mount
parts.spec: Rear pusher 2814 BLDC mount, 10x7 folding prop clearance, thrust line +1deg down

parts.label: GPS + Pitot Boom
parts.spec: Nose boom 8mm, GPS at tip, pitot static port forward, BEC airflow shielded

parts.label: Camera Gimbal Bay
parts.spec: Forward downward camera gimbal bay 70mm deep, 2-axis micro gimbal, optical window

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide)
parts.spec: 4S 16000mAh Li-ion slide-in bay, CG adjust slot, top access hatch, balance lead window

parts.label: Integration Service Backbone
parts.spec: Wing/fuselage integration service backbone with assembly_datum pads, harness_raceway, service_hatch, connector_keying, anti-rotation wing datum, and visible load-path inspection marks

requirements.description: Center body pod for long-range surveillance wing

generated_parts.label: Center Body Pod
generated_parts.spec: Flying-wing center pod, equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

requirements.description: Center body pod for long-range surveillance wing

verify.value: All required fields are present and non-empty.
verify.rule: All required fields must be present and non-empty.
The mass estimate must be a numeric value in grams.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 internal_feature_target must appear as a part_tree child or geometry_ops id/target.

verify.value: All interfaces have matching connection_type, dof, clearance_mm, and required_feature in neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: All critical joints have visible locking method and preload evidence.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking method and preload evidence.
Boundary conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Wing spar reinforcement may not withstand 3g loads if not properly designed.
risk.mit: Verify spar reinforcement design through FEA analysis.

risk.desc: Cooling air flow may be insufficient if channel is not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct flow tests to ensure adequate cooling air flow.

risk.desc: Equipment bay door may not open/close properly if hinge is not aligned.
risk.mit: Perform alignment checks during assembly.

risk.desc: Motor mount may not be properly aligned with motor pylon.
risk.mit: Use calipers and torque wrench to verify alignment.

risk.desc: Harness path may be damaged during assembly if not properly routed.
risk.mit: Ensure harness path is routed safely during assembly.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Equipment bay door, wing-spar reinforcement, motor pylon at rear

physics_paths.description: Wing bending loads from 3g are transferred to the center pod via the wing spars and reinforced ribs
Cooling air flows from the cooling_inlet to the motor pod through a channel
Heat from the motor pod is dissipated through the cooling_inlet and the pod's surface
The equipment bay door opens and closes along a revolute bearing
Electrical harnesses pass through harness_path to connect motor pod to control systems
Service access is provided through the equipment bay door

manufacturing_strategy.support: build direction aligned with major axis
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: visual and tactile inspection of surface finish and alignment

verification_focus.description: Check bolt pattern and alignment with motor pylon
Verify cooling air flow through channel

generated_parts.label: Wing Spar (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: 20mm CFRP main spar, 2-piece centerjoint, anti-rotation key, 800mm half-span each

verify.value: All required features are present.
verify.rule: Each part_tree child must have at least 4 dedicated geometry_ops.
Mass must be a numeric grams value.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
verify.rule: P0 internal_feature_targets must map to geometry_ops.

verify.value: All interfaces with neighboring subsystems are named and reciprocal.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be reciprocal with neighboring subsystems.

verify.value: Critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent.
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible locking/preload evidence.
Boundary_conditions must include fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential for sensor pocket to integrate avionics modules may lead to additional weight.
risk.mit: Conduct a weight impact analysis before adding avionics modules.

risk.desc: Possible to add more service access cuts for maintenance may increase structural integrity risks.
risk.mit: Perform a structural integrity assessment before adding more service access cuts.

risk.desc: FDM process may not achieve the desired surface finish for certain critical interfaces.
risk.mit: Consider post-processing techniques such as sanding or coating to improve surface finish.

risk.desc: Thermal dissipation from electronics to spar via thermal vias may not be sufficient.
risk.mit: Evaluate thermal management solutions and possibly increase the number of thermal vias.

risk.desc: Anti-rotation key may not provide sufficient rotational restraint during wing flapping motion.
risk.mit: Review the design of the anti-rotation key and consider increasing its size or adding additional locking mechanisms.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Main spar, ribs, carry-through, fuselage frames; continuous load path
physics_paths: load_path: wing bending load transfers through spar to fuselage frames via carry-through
flow_path: air flow around wing surface
thermal_path: heat dissipation from electronics to spar via thermal vias
motion_path: wing flapping motion constrained by anti-rotation key
pressure_path: aerodynamic pressure on wing surface
integration_opportunities: potential for sensor pocket to integrate avionics modules
possible to add more service access cuts for maintenance

generated_parts.label: Wing Rib Set x 12
generated_parts.spec: Wing rib NACA airfoil profile, lightening pockets, leading edge sock, trailing edge taper

verify.rule: Ensure all required evidence_features are present in part_tree/geometry_ops.
Ensure cad_brief.mass_est_g is a numeric value and within budget.
Ensure P0 internal_feature_targets appear as part_tree children and geometry_ops ids or targets.
Ensure adjacent interfaces include fit_class and stack_up_mm.
Ensure critical joints have visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence.
Ensure boundary_conditions object is present with fixture_points, thermal_zones, and pressure_faces.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between EPP foam core and CFRP spar.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and ensure materials have compatible expansion coefficients.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient structural integrity if fasteners are not properly preloaded.
risk.mit: Include detailed preload instructions and inspect fasteners during assembly.

risk.desc: Potential airflow disruption due to non-optimized airfoil section.
risk.mit: Perform CFD analysis to optimize airfoil section for minimal drag.

risk.desc: Risk of control surface misalignment if hinge line is not precisely manufactured.
risk.mit: Implement high-precision manufacturing techniques for hinge line.

risk.desc: Potential electrical interference if harness routing is not properly managed.
risk.mit: Ensure electrical harness routing does not interfere with other subsystems.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Wing planform, airfoil section evidence, winglets, elevon/control surface cutouts with hinges

physics_paths.description: Load path from wing root to tip, through spar and ribs
Airflow over NACA airfoil profile
Thermal management through lightening pockets
Control surface hinge motion
Human access for maintenance
Electrical harness routing

risk.desc: Potential thermal stress due to environmental temperature range.
risk.mit: Implement thermal management features such as heat sinks and insulation.

risk.desc: Risk of cable damage during assembly due to unsupported routing.
risk.mit: Ensure all cables have strain relief and follow specified bend radius.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to lack of datum features.
risk.mit: Add primary datum features such as flat surfaces or bores.

risk.desc: Risk of improper fit due to undefined interface tolerances.
risk.mit: Specify fit_class and stack_up_mm for all interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of mechanism failure due to insufficient cycle life.
risk.mit: Increase cycle life through material selection and design optimization.

Control horn motion transferred to control surface
Environmental heat dissipation from servo
Servo motion transferred to control horn
Electrical signal from servo to flight computer
